title: 🛠️ Jobs Guide (Energy + Work)
footer: Veyra • Jobs consume Energy • Tip: Manage Energy like a resource

pages.title: 🛠️ Jobs Overview
pages.description:
Jobs are the one of the main way to **earn gold and resources**. Each job costs **Energy**.

If you’re broke: do jobs.
If you’re rich: do jobs anyway (because capitalism).

fields.name: Core Commands
fields.value:
• `/work <job>` - perform a job
• `/check energy` - check your current energy

Examples:
`/work miner`
`/work digger`
`/work knight`

fields.name: Important
fields.value: Jobs **consume Energy** instantly. If you don’t have enough, Veyra will tell you you’re tired and you’ll have to wait for energy regen.

pages.title: ⚡ Energy System (How it works)
pages.description:
Energy is your daily stamina. Every job costs a chunk of Energy.

Think of Energy as your limited number of ""actions"". Use it smart.

fields.name: Max Energy
fields.value:
Your max Energy scales with level:

**Max Energy = 35 + (15 × Level)**

So higher level players can grind longer.

fields.name: Energy Regeneration
fields.value:
Energy regenerates automatically over time .

✅ You gain **+1 Energy** per regen tick(6 min) until you hit your max.

fields.name: Energy Check
fields.value:
When you check energy, Veyra shows:
`current_energy / max_energy`

Example: `42/80`

pages.title: 🛡️ Knight
pages.description: Knight is a straightforward gold job. It’s consistent and simple.

fields.name: Energy Cost
fields.value: **55 Energy**

fields.name: Rewards
fields.value: Earn **40 to 90 gold** (random).

fields.name: When to use
fields.value: Use Knight when you just want raw gold without gambling for loot.

pages.title: ⛏️ Digger
pages.description: Digger is a loot-focused job. You spend energy to dig and either get gold or loot boxes.

fields.name: Energy Cost
fields.value: **70 Energy**

fields.name: Possible Rewards
fields.value:
You get **one** of these rewards:

• **20 gold**
• **Wooden Box**
• **Stone Box**
• **Iron Box**
• **Platinum Box**

fields.name: Drop Chances
fields.value:
Approximate chances:

• **Wooden Box**: 35%
• **Stone Box**: 25%
• **Iron Box**: 10%
• **Platinum Box**: 3%
• **Gold (20)**: 27%

fields.name: Why it’s good
fields.value: If you like rolling for loot or want boxes for trading/collecting, Digger is your best friend.

pages.title: ⛏️ Miner
pages.description: Miner is your resource grind job. It gives ores used for crafting systems and economy loops.

fields.name: Energy Cost
fields.value: **70 Energy**

fields.name: Possible Rewards
fields.value:
You get **one** of these:

• **25 gold**
• **Coal**
• **Copper Ore**
• **Iron Ore**
• **Silver Ore**

fields.name: Ore Drop Chances
fields.value:
Approximate chances:

• Copper Ore: 30%
• Coal: 27%
• Iron Ore: 21%
• Silver Ore: 12%
• Gold (25): 10%

fields.name: Ore Amount
fields.value:
Most of the time you get **3–6 ores**.

There is a rare bonus outcome where you get **12–20 ores** instead.

fields.name: Best use
fields.value: Do Miner if you want crafting materials or want to stockpile resources for later systems.

pages.title: 🗡️ Thief
pages.description: Thief is PvP economy. You attempt to steal gold from another user. High risk, high annoyance.

fields.name: Energy Cost
fields.value: **69 Energy**

fields.name: Requirements
fields.value:
• Target must be a registered resident/player
• You cannot rob yourself

fields.name: Success / Fail
fields.value:
Thief is a coin flip:

✅ **Success:**
• You steal **5% to 10% of target's gold**, capped at **300**
• Target loses an extra **1% of their gold**

❌ **Fail:**
• You lose **30 gold** (ouch)

fields.name: Tips
fields.value:
• Don’t rob broke players (it just wastes energy)
• Rob rich players, but expect revenge
• If you can’t afford the 30 gold fail penalty, don’t gamble.

pages.title: 🧭 Explorer
pages.description: Explorer lets you roam around and discover one random item. It’s a loot job, not a gold job.

fields.name: Energy Cost
fields.value: **20 Energy**

fields.name: Rewards
fields.value: You find **1 random item**.

fields.name: Rarity Chances
fields.value: Explorer currently rolls a random Rare(85%) or Common(15%) item.

fields.name: When to use
fields.value: Use Explorer when you want quick loot for collecting, quest, or low on energy.
